title: Consume dashboards via API
excerpt:
Hello all, 
The current version of Monday.com api doesn’t have a dashboard endpoint as far as I am aware. I would like to access dashboard data via api. Is that possible?

posts.author: erdem (erdem)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

The current version of Monday.com api doesn’t have a dashboard endpoint as far as I am aware. I would like to access dashboard data via api. Is that possible?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

I replied in the email thread you opened with us!

See you there!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: shadmickelberry (Shad Mickelberry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

I was about to submit another question on the forum exactly for this but ran into this thread.

Was there any method to achieve this?

Thank you

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @shadmickelberry

f what you want to do is to query for information in a dashboard via API, that is not possible. But the information in the dashboard is probably coming from a monday board/s so you can use the API to query for that data directly

posts.author: shadmickelberry (Shad Mickelberry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you very much for the response @Matias.Monday. I figured as much but I thought I’d ask. In this case we are looking to audit the location of the dashboards as a check that they didn’t get moved accidentally or mistakenly on purpose .

Thanks again for the reply.
